bonuses.stat: While in combat, casting an ability that leaves an effect on the ground creates a 6 meter Spike Vortex that deals 3855 Physical damage over 5 seconds to enemies inside it. After 5 seconds, enemies within the Vortex are dealt 1925 Physical damage over 5 seconds. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
